name: MSP_chrII_cluster
description: Secondary MSP (Major Sperm Protein) tandem cluster on C. elegans chromosome II. Contains a subset of msp paralogs (including msp-3, msp-19, msp-45, msp-49, msp-79, msp-142) interspersed with ssp-9, ssp-10 sperm-specific genes. Paralog identity to the chrIV main cluster is >90% across the coding sequence, so reads from chrII and chrIV msp copies multi-map. The cluster sits in the autosome arm domain enriched for tandem-duplicated germline genes.
expected_copy_count: 8-12 msp paralogs in this secondary cluster
